4. There's a `/reset` endpoint

- Integer overflow with buy_qty
- Negative quantity
- Price manipulation
- Race condition
- Budget bypass through some logic flaw

Interesting! The negative quantity purchase gives a message "购买了 -1 个 S级特权凭证 (Flag)... 但这并没有什么用。" and the budget changed to ￥10099 (from 100). So buying -1 of the flag item (price 9999) gives back 9999 to the budget: 100 + 9999 = 10099. Now I have enough budget to buy the flag item!

Let me try buying the flag item with the current budget of 10099.
